description:
You are a Flight Dynamics Ephemeris Manager. A scientific satellite, MagSat-2, requires coordinated tracking from both the NASA DSN and an international partner network. Propagate the post-maneuver state vector for exactly 14 days using the orbital and physical parameters provided in ~/Desktop/magsat2_state.txt. The propagation must use a high-fidelity force model (JGM-2 10x10, Sun & Luna point masses, JacchiaRoberts drag, and SRP). Generate two 60-second resolution ephemeris files: a CCSDS OEM file with Interpolation Order 7 saved to ~/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.oem and a SPICE SPK file saved to ~/GMAT_output/magsat2_predicts.bsp. Save the GMAT script to ~/Documents/missions/magsat2_ephemeris.script.

Login: username=ga, password=password123
